inputs.label: Transfer Amount
inputs.businessContext: The principal amount to be transferred in US dollars.

businessContext_i18n.en: The principal amount to be transferred in US dollars.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ABD doları cinsinden transfer edilecek anapara tutarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der in US-Dollar zu überweisende Kapitalbetrag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant principal à transférer en dollars américains.
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto principal a transferir en dólares estadounidenses.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المبلغ الأساسي المراد تحويله بالدولار الأمريكي.

inputs.label: Sender's Flat Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fixed fee charged by the sending bank.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed fee charged by the sending bank.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gönderen banka tarafından alınan sabit ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Feste Gebühr, die von der sendenden Bank erhoben wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais fixes facturés par la banque émettrice.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa fija cobrada por el banco emisor.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرسوم الثابتة التي يتقاضاها البنك المرسل.

inputs.label: Sender's Percentage Fee
inputs.businessContext: Percentage fee charged by the sending bank on the transfer amount.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage fee charged by the sending bank on the transfer amount.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gönderen banka tarafından transfer tutarı üzerinden alınan yüzde ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentuale Gebühr, die von der sendenden Bank auf den Überweisungsbetrag erhoben wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais en pourcentage facturés par la banque émettrice sur le montant du transfert.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de tarifa cobrado por el banco emisor sobre el monto de transferencia.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرسوم النسبية التي يتقاضاها البنك المرسل على مبلغ التحويل.

inputs.label: Intermediary Bank Flat Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fixed fee charged by any intermediary bank, typically for international transfers.

label_i18n.fr: Frais fixes de la banque intermédiaire

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed fee charged by any intermediary bank, typically for international transfers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Herhangi bir aracı banka tarafından alınan sabit ücret, genellikle uluslararası transferlerde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Feste Gebühr, die von einer zwischengeschalteten Bank erhoben wird, typischerweise bei internationalen Überweisungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais fixes facturés par une banque intermédiaire, généralement pour les transferts internationaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa fija cobrada por cualquier banco intermediario, típicamente para transferencias internacionales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرسوم الثابتة التي يتقاضاها أي بنك وسيط، عادة للتحويلات الدولية.

inputs.label: Receiver's Flat Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fixed fee charged by the receiving bank.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed fee charged by the receiving bank.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alıcı banka tarafından alınan sabit ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Feste Gebühr, die von der empfangenden Bank erhoben wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais fixes facturés par la banque réceptrice.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa fija cobrada por el banco receptor.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرسوم الثابتة التي يتقاضاها البنك المستلم.

inputs.label: International Transfer
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 if the transfer is international (involves intermediary/receiver fees), 0 for domestic.

businessContext_i18n.en: Set to 1 if the transfer is international (involves intermediary/receiver fees), 0 for domestic.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Transfer uluslararası ise (aracı/alıcı ücretleri içeriyorsa) 1, yurtiçi ise 0 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Auf 1 setzen, wenn die Überweisung international ist (Zwischen-/Empfängergebühren), 0 für Inland.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mettre à 1 si le transfert est international (implique des frais d'intermédiaire/bénéficiaire), 0 pour national.
businessContext_i18n.es: Establecer en 1 si la transferencia es internacional (involucra tarifas de intermediario/destinatario), 0 para nacional.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اضبط على 1 إذا كان التحويل دوليًا (يشمل رسوم وسيط/مستلم)، 0 للمحلي.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
